Ceria Flow ZERO-KNOWLEDGE PERPETUALS · STELLAR SOROBAN
SYSTEM ARCHITECTURE Groth16 · BN254 · GCP Confidential Space
CLIENT LAYER CONFIDENTIAL COMPUTE SETTLEMENT LAYER
Browser
FREIGHTER WALLET
ACTIONS
· Encrypt order → TEE pubkey · Sign Stellar transactions · Store note secrets locally · Submit proof to Soroban · View live 32-level orderbook · Monitor positions + funding
SHIELDED NOTE
note_cmt = Poseidon2( amount, secret, 8)
WALLET Freighter · Stellar Testnet
Trusted Execution Environment
GCP CONFIDENTIAL SPACE · AMD SEV-SNP
COMPONENTS
CLOB ENGINE
· Price-time priority matching · Market / Limit / Stop orders · IOC · FOK · TP/SL · WAL persistence · RwLock
GROTH16 PROVER
· arkworks · BN254 scalar field · 6 circuits · proving keys in RAM · Keys never leave enclave
COMMITMENT CHAIN (POSEIDON2)
h₁ = P₂(side, price, 1) h₂ = P₂(h₁, size, 2) h₃ = P₂(h₂, leverage, 3) h₄ = P₂(h₃, asset, 4) h₅ = P₂(h₄, is_mkt, 5) h₆ = P₂(h₅, nonce, 6) cmt = P₂(h₆, secret, 7) ◀ public null = P₂(cmt, secret, 9) ◀ public domain sep per round → no aliasing
ZK CIRCUITS · R1CS over BN254 · ark-r1cs-std
OrderCommitment
NoteSpend
OrderMatch
OrderCancel
ShieldedInsert
ShieldedWithdraw TCP :9720 encrypted · HTTP :9721 public
🔒 AMD SEV-SNP encrypts all memory. Host operator sees only encrypted bytes in, proof out. Private keys generated inside enclave at boot · KMS-backed · never exported
Stellar Soroban
PROTOCOL 26 · TESTNET
PROOF VERIFICATION · BN254 HOST FUNCTIONS
verify_groth16(proof: Groth16Proof, public_inputs: Vec<Bn254Fr>, vk) → g1_msm() multi-scalar multiplication over G1 → pairing_check() e(A,B) · e(α,β) · e(C,δ) = 1 → panic!() if invalid (reject tx atomically)
DEPLOYED CONTRACTS
perp-engine
Positions (open/close) Collateral management Oracle prices (mark) Funding rate accrual Liquidation logic Asset config (max lev) ZK proof gating Nullifier registry
orderbook
Order commitments place_order(cmt, proof) cancel_order(cmt, proof) Match nullifiers open_position_from_note close_position_to_note add_margin_from_note
collateral-token
USDC (7-decimal scale) mint / burn / transfer deposit_note(cmt) withdraw_note(proof) Trust registry Balance tracking PRICE_SCALE = 1e7
Chain stores: commitment hashes · nullifiers · proof verification results Position size · collateral · direction · P&L are NEVER stored in plaintext on-chain
KEEPER INFRASTRUCTURE · RUST BINARY
Pyth Network HERMES REST + WEBSOCKET
· 7 market price feeds · Sub-second tick updates · Auto-reconnect WS
BTC XRP XLM SPCE TSLA OIL GOLD
Oracle Keeper EVERY 30 SECONDS
· Fetch Pyth REST prices · set_asset_price on-chain · stellar CLI + Soroban RPC · 2s delay between markets
Market Maker 32 LEVELS / SIDE · ALGORITHMIC
· Size: base × 1.08^level (geometric) · Spread: Crypto (5+3×lvl) bps · RWA (10+5×lvl) bps · Re-quote if mid moves >0.5% or TTL >5 min · Pre-generates proof pool to avoid latency
Liquidator EVERY 30 SECONDS
· Scan position watchlist JSON · Check collateral + PnL vs mark · Call liquidate(commitment) · Keeper fee + return residual
① encrypted
③ proof π
④ submit tx + proof
② match proof
mark price read
price ticks
⑤ set_asset_price
⑥ place_order (32 lvls)
⑦ liquidate()
GROTH16
π = (A, B, C) ∈ BN254 curve
256 bytes on-chain ~250ms verify
FLOW STEPS
① User encrypts order → TEE pubkey
② TEE runs CLOB · generates Groth16 proof · submits match
③ Proof π returned to client browser
④ Client submits open_position_from_note tx to Soroban
⑤ Oracle keeper pushes Pyth prices every 30s
⑥ Market maker seeds 64 CLOB levels (32 bid + 32 ask)
⑦ Liquidator calls liquidate() on under-collateralised positions
Cerida · ZK Perpetuals on Stellar · Groth16 / BN254 · GCP Confidential Space / AMD SEV-SNP · Pyth Oracle · 7 Markets cerida.xyz
